summary: A straight Fox & Friends Weekend broadcast clip (LIVE banner, network chyrons, anchors plus a remote interview with DHS Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin) about an illegal-immigrant hit-and-run that killed USC student Nate Baker. The audio is a continuous talking interview blaming open-border policies, with a photo of the victim shown. There is no music track, cinematic editing, or stylized spectacle, so it does not fit youth-appeal produced content.
notable_text: Chyrons: 'SC AG TO PROSECUTE ILLEGAL MIGRANT ACCUSED IN DEADLY HIT-AND-RUN', 'UNIV OF SC STUDENT KILLED IN HIT-AND-RUN INVOLVING ILLEGAL MIGRANT SUSPECT', 'TRICIA McLAUGHLIN | DHS ASSISTANT SECRETARY', source tag 'X/@TriciaOhio', 'FOX & FRIENDS WEEKEND'.
